entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the primary crop affected by leaf miner

entities.name: LEAF MINER
entities.description: Liriomyza cicerina, an insect pest that causes yield losses in chickpea

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist infestation by the leaf miner

entities.name: C. RETICULATUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used as the source for the mutant line AWC 612M

entities.name: GAMMA RAYS
entities.description: Radiation used to induce mutations in C. reticulatum

entities.name: MUTATION
entities.description: The process of inducing genetic variation to develop resistant lines

entities.name: AWC 612M
entities.description: A mutant germplasm line developed from C. reticulatum that is resistant to leaf miner

entities.name: MULTIPINNATE LEAF TYPE
entities.description: A specific leaf morphology characteristic of the AWC 612M line

entities.name: NATURAL EPIDEMIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental state of pest prevalence used for testing resistance

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The physical site where the resistance of AWC 612M was evaluated

entities.name: ILC 3397
entities.description: A susceptible chickpea line used as a control in resistance trials

entities.name: LEAF DROP
entities.description: A symptom of leaf miner infestation observed in susceptible lines

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: The systematic process of developing improved crop varieties using resistant sources
